title: Employment Requirements and Restrictions: Pre-Employment Reviews
description: Before hiring any new employee, Conroe ISD conducts background checks and other pre-employment reviews to help ensure the safety of students and staff. These reviews may include criminal history checks and other screenings to identify any concerns that could affect a person's eligibility to work in the district. Knowing these safeguards are in place helps families feel confident that the district takes a careful approach to bringing new employees into its schools.
